subject: Q3 Strategy Review - URGENT
body: Please prepare the Q3 numbers for Monday's board meeting. The investors are expecting a full breakdown of revenue by segment. This is the top priority for this week.

subject: This Week in AI: New Models, New Benchmarks
body: Here are the top stories from the AI world this week: 1) A new open-source model beats GPT-4 on coding benchmarks. 2) Google announces Gemini 2.0. 3) The EU AI Act enforcement begins in February. Click through for full coverage.

subject: Updated PTO Policy - Please Acknowledge
body: Hi team, we've updated our PTO policy effective January 1st. Key changes: unlimited PTO is now capped at 25 days, carryover is limited to 5 days, and blackout dates apply during Q4 close. Please review and acknowledge by Friday.

subject: RE: Contract Renewal Discussion
body: Thanks for the proposal. We've reviewed internally and have some concerns about the pricing for the enterprise tier. Can we schedule a call this week to discuss? Our CFO wants to be on the call. Availability: Tuesday 2-4pm or Thursday morning.

subject: Dependabot Alert: Critical Vulnerability in lodash
body: A critical severity vulnerability was found in lodash (CVE-2024-XXXX) used in your repository my-app. This vulnerability allows prototype pollution leading to remote code execution. We recommend updating to lodash@4.17.22 or later immediately.

subject: Your Free Trial Expires in 3 Days
body: Hi there! Your 14-day free trial of SaaS-Tool Pro is ending on November 21st. Upgrade now to keep access to advanced analytics, custom dashboards, and priority support. Use code SAVE20 for 20% off your first year.

subject: Bug in Production - Customer Checkout Failing
body: Hey, just got 3 reports from customers who can't complete checkout. The payment gateway is returning 502 errors. I checked the logs and it looks like our Stripe webhook endpoint is timing out. Can you take a look? I'm in meetings until 2pm.

subject: Upcoming: AI & Coffee Meetup This Saturday
body: Join us this Saturday at WeWork TLV for our monthly AI & Coffee meetup. This month's topic: Building production-ready agents with LangGraph. Speaker: Dr. Sarah Chen from Anthropic. RSVP to save your spot. Limited to 40 attendees.
